M0300C1 Stage 3 Pressure Ulcer Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the current number of unhealed Stage 3 pressure ulcers. 0 Minimum
9 Maximum
- Not assessed/no information
^ Blank (skip pattern)
419 M0300C2_STG_3_ULCR_ADMSN_NUM M0300C2_STG_3_ULCR_ADMSN_NUM M0300C2 Stage 3 Pressure Ulcer Present on Admission Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of Stage 3 pressure ulcers that were present on admission/entry or reentry. 0 Minimum
9 Maximum
- Not assessed/no
